meaning: n.药剂师,配药员,分配者,施与者,自动售货机
examples: The dispenser quickly filled the prescription for me.
This simple application provides a fortune cookie dispenser.
Why not create a working beer dispenser with a computer chassis.
Unlike many rich men, Wilpon is an asker of questions as much as a dispenser of opinions.
With everyone touching a skeevy bar of soap or the soap dispenser, aren't we just recirculating germs?
